@graph.description: Phenylpropanoid from nutmeg with weak MAO-inhibitory and cholinergic effects. Psychoactive and potentially toxic at high doses; a concerning constituent in large nutmeg ingestion. Not recommended as supplement.
@graph.name: myristicin
